dialogues: Okay, my fish are dying right in front of me.
You know I looked everywhere?
You should see what my father used to do before he bought a new car.
You're aware of that? Kill them.
-What's with you? -My ear itches.
Every one of them believed that the secret of life...
...for my living room. This was a waste of time.
-Isn't it the other way? -There's no other way.
...you still don't really know, sometimes, which way to walk...
...we'll find the car, Jerry will show up and we'll never find you!
koreanHints: 1. 저기요, 제 물고기들이 지금 제 눈앞에서 죽어가고 있어요.
2. 제가 어디든 다 찾아봤다는 거 알죠?
3. 우리 아버지가 새 차 사시기 전에 뭘 하셨는지 보셨어야 하는데.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- right in front of me : 바로 내 눈앞에서. 상황의 급박함이나 명백함을 강조할 때 사용하는 표현
- I looked everywhere : 모든 곳을 다 찾아봤다는 의미. 철저히 찾았음을 나타낼 때 쓰는 자연스러운 표현
- You should see : 상대방이 직접 봤어야 한다는 뉘앙스로, 놀라운 일이나 믿기 어려운 일을 설명할 때 쓰는 구어체 표현
- used to do : 과거의 습관이나 반복적 행동을 나타내는 표현

dialogues: You got some suds over here.
You know, George, I think I can help you.
is that there's good naked and bad naked.
and suffering from intense malaise.
When are you getting out?
I asked if I could borrow a sweater.
"Dismantle latch hasp beneath main drainage line."
Well, maybe she just practices good hygiene.
Oh, okay. Well, thanks, buddy.
Is there anybody else here but you?
koreanHints: 1. 내가 도와줄 수 있을 것 같은데.
2. 좋은 노출이 있고 나쁜 노출이 있다는 거야.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- I think I can help you : 상대방에게 도움을 제안할 때 쓰는 부드러운 표현. "I can help you"보다 "I think"를 붙여서 겸손하고 조심스럽게 제안하는 뉘앙스
- there's good A and bad A : 같은 범주 안에서도 좋고 나쁨이 구분된다는 걸 표현할 때. 일상에서 의견을 나눌 때 자주 쓰는 패턴
- practice good hygiene : "위생을 철저히 지키다"라는 의미. practice는 "실천하다, 습관적으로 하다"의 뉘앙스로 good habits, safe sex 등과도 자주 쓰임

sessions.episode: How I Met Your Mother - S08E05  The Autumn of Break-Ups
dialogues: You've been a hell of a wingman.
the Mosby Boys were put on the case, and it was...
That was Victoria asking you to move to Denver with her.
I'll go... Aah... fetch him.
I think he always wanted a wingman who was a bit of a dog too.
Besides, we dated before, and that time counts.
Ted, tell her that you're not gonna stop being friends with Robin.
You guys dated before. That time counts.
That dude seems fine to me.
Why did you need to tell me that?
koreanHints: 2. 우리 전에 사귄 적 있잖아. 그건 포함되는 거야.
3. 왜 굳이 나한테 그걸 말해야 했어?
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- a hell of a : 정말 대단한, 엄청난 (긍정적 강조 표현. a hell of a guy, a hell of a night 등으로 활용)
- wingman : 친구의 연애를 돕는 조력자 (원래 전투기 편대 비행에서 유래. 일상에서 친구를 돕는 사람을 의미)
- That counts : 그것도 포함돼, 그것도 인정돼 (계산이나 고려 대상에 들어간다는 의미)
- Why did you need to~ : 왜 굳이 ~해야 했어? (need to를 써서 불필요했다는 불만을 은근히 표현)
